  <span class="header_general"><strong>Address:</strong> Karlsruhe, Germany</span>

<div><span class="header_general"><strong>EDUCATION</strong></span></div>
<hr/>

<div class="pdf24_05 pdf24_06">
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:10.7956em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.05em;">M.Sc. Computer Science </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_23" style="word-spacing:0.0323em;">— Ozyegin University — 3.87/4 GPA &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:37.4573em;top:10.7956em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">Sept 2019 - Sept 2022 &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:11.9911em;z-index:290;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_24">T</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">o</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_27" style="word-spacing:0.0366em;">pic: FPGA Implementation of High-Bandwidth Communication through LED-Based DCO-OFDM &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:13.4037em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_28" style="word-spacing:0.0423em;">B.Sc. Electrical and Electronics Engineering </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_23" style="word-spacing:0.0323em;">— Ozyegin University — 3.29/4 GPA &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:37.3818em;top:13.4037em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_19" style="word-spacing:0.0313em;">Sept 2015 - June 2019 &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:14.5992em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.0466em;">Focus: Electronics and Digital Systems &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:15.7947em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">Ranked 1</span><sup style="top: -0.3012em;"><span class="pdf24_30 pdf24_08 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.2185em;">st </span></sup><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_31" style="word-spacing:0.0253em;">in the Electrical &amp; Electronics Engineering Department in the class of 2019 &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:17.2074em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">Minor Computer Science </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_23" style="word-spacing:0.0323em;">— Ozyegin University — 3.20/4 GPA &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:37.684em;top:17.2074em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_32" style="word-spacing:0.0371em;">Feb 2018 - June 2019 &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:18.4029em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_33" style="word-spacing:0.0376em;">Focus: Object Oriented Programming, Data Structures and Algorithms &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:20.0359em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_09">EXPERIENCE &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:21.331em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_34" style="word-spacing:0.0335em;">Researcher, Digital Design Engineer — CDNC, Karlsruhe Institute of Technology &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:37.6134em;top:21.3277em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_35" style="word-spacing:0.0316em;">Dec 2022 - June 2025 &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:22.5232em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.013em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_27" style="word-spacing:0.0131em;">Conducted in-depth research on digital logic design for Printed Electronics (PE) utilizing Synopsys and ModelSim &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:23.7187em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_36" style="word-spacing:0.031em;">Actualized and optimized hardware for machine learning (ML) models to effectively address PE constraints &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:24.9143em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_12" style="word-spacing:0.0296em;">Created testbenches for veriﬁcation and performed Static Timing Analysis (S</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_24">T</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">A</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_37" style="word-spacing:0.0337em;">) following the ASIC Design Flow &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:26.1098em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_36" style="word-spacing:0.0309em;">Delivered automated frameworks in Python for ALU approximation using a genetic algorithm &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:27.3053em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.0299em;">Streamlined the training of machine learning models for bespoke approximate digital designs &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:28.5008em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_38" style="word-spacing:0.0313em;">Built a Python RISCV Assembly Generator for ML models, improving memory usage, callbacks, and branches &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:29.6963em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_39" style="word-spacing:0.0305em;">Instructed students on SoC design and AMD’s Xilinx Vivado Suite twice &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:30.8918em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.03em;">Constructed a new curriculum for the FPGA Programming lab &nbsp;</span></div>
	<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:32.0873em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_40" style="word-spacing:0.0301em;">Supervised 2 software development projects in Praxis der Software-Entwicklung (PSE), mentored 10 students &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:43.0641em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_44" style="word-spacing:0.0275em;">Produced instructional videos for online learning, such as </span><a href="https://youtu.be/KRK704U_gIE?si=z-Sopolorop0TMEZ" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_45" style="word-spacing:0.0367em;">Verilog Design Rules &nbsp;</span></a></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:45.6722em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_20" style="word-spacing:0.0308em;">Conducted research in the Quartus Prime environment for Intel Altera FPGAs, focusing on tool evaluation &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:46.8677em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.0299em;">Designed custom digital logic circuits to test the functionality of various tools effectively &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:48.0632em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_12" style="word-spacing:0.0297em;">Authored comprehensive reports and guides for each tool, ensuring future usability and reference &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:53.0624em;z-index:2754;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_47" style="word-spacing:0.0289em;">Gained proﬁciency in Agile methodologies, </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_24">T</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">e</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_41" style="word-spacing:0.0333em;">stRail, and Jira for effective project management &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:24.2139em;z-index:1138;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_52" style="word-spacing:0.0298em;">Implemented DC Biased Optical OFDM (DCO-OFDM) for a Visible Light Communication System on FPGA, &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:26.6049em;z-index:1375;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_35" style="word-spacing:0.0317em;">Addressed the high complexity of DCO-OFDM calculations by leveraging FPGA technolog</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_64">y</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">, </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">e</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_76" style="word-spacing:0.0353em;">ffectively meeting &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:27.8005em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_20" style="word-spacing:0.0308em;">the growing demand for higher bandwidth in communication systems &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:32.7996em;z-index:1648;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_78" style="word-spacing:0.0344em;">Developed a comprehensive tool in Python/Perl/Tcl for customization of the Very Simple CPU, translating &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:33.9951em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.0299em;">compiled assembly code into tailored memory implementations and a customized soft core in Verilog HDL &nbsp;</span></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:40.1898em;z-index:2127;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_20" style="word-spacing:0.039em;">Applied Software Design Patterns (Singletons, Mediators...) using Advanced OO</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_60">P</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">, </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_18">a</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_79" style="word-spacing:0.0392em;">vailable on </span><a href="https://github.com/gurolsaglam/CS534-VSCPUSim" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">GitHub &nbsp;</span></a></div>

			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:42.7979em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_20" style="word-spacing:0.0308em;">Manufactured rover prototypes in a student-driven, multi-disciplinary research team at Ozyegin University &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:43.9934em;z-index:2318;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_81" style="word-spacing:0.035em;">Designed PCB layouts for all components, worked on communication using UAR</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_24">T</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">, </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">S</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_33" style="word-spacing:0.0282em;">PI, I</span><sup style="top: -0.3012em;"><span class="pdf24_82 pdf24_11 pdf24_83">2</span></sup><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_84" style="word-spacing:0.0613em;">C, ROS &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:45.1889em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_76" style="word-spacing:0.0355em;">Competed in European Rover Challenge, mentored the team the following year, available on </span><a href="https://rover.ozyegin.edu.tr" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_55" style="word-spacing:0.0305em;">our website &nbsp;</span></a></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:46.6049em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_85" style="word-spacing:0.0396em;">Voice-Controlled Chess &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:47.7971em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_33" style="word-spacing:0.0282em;">Built a voice-controlled chess game using the SpeechRecognition library and Google API &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:48.9926em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_47" style="word-spacing:0.0291em;">Utilized tkinter from Python’s Standard Library to construct the front-end &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:50.1881em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_40" style="word-spacing:0.0302em;">Demonstrated Object-Oriented Programming principles in Python, available on </span><a href="https://github.com/gurolsaglam/Voice-Commanded-Chess" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">GitHub &nbsp;</span></a></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:51.604em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_86" style="word-spacing:0.0387em;">Kariyer.net Mobile Testing Automation &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:52.7962em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_33" style="word-spacing:0.0283em;">Proposed tool comparing job listings in web and mobile apps, identifying inconsistencies in API results &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:53.9917em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_29" style="word-spacing:0.03em;">Identiﬁed opportunities to reduce ﬁxed costs and human error in manual testing, available on </span><a href="https://github.com/gurolsaglam/Kariyer.net-mobile-automation" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">GitHub &nbsp;</span></a></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:55.4076em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_39" style="word-spacing:0.0303em;">Study Room Counter &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:56.5999em;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.008em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_55" style="word-spacing:0.0104em;">Engineered a cost-effective solution for tracking room occupation to automate booking within the campus network &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:57.7954em;z-index:3005;"><span class="pdf24_25 pdf24_26 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">• </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_77" style="word-spacing:0.0325em;">Employed ESP8266, CloudMQT</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_24">T</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09" style="word-spacing:0.028em;">, </span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">a</span><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_87" style="word-spacing:0.0367em;">nd several sensors to implement an IoT device, available on </span><a href="https://github.com/tahadarendeli/Sonar-Sensor-Room-Visitor-With-Single-Entrance" target="_blank"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_09">GitHub &nbsp;</span></a></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:59.4284em;"><span class="pdf24_07 pdf24_08 pdf24_09">REFERENCES &nbsp;</span></div>
			<div class="pdf24_01" style="left:3.841em;top:60.5031em;"><span class="pdf24_10 pdf24_11 pdf24_88" style="word-spacing:0.0374em;">Available upon request. &nbsp;</span></div>
